$comment: Showtime Visual QA Specification — derived from design-system.md, CLAUDE.md, direction-4-the-show.html mockup, and index.css @theme tokens. Source of truth for automated visual QA.

constraints: No inline styles (style={{}}). All styling via Tailwind utility classes.
All views must use w-full h-full to fill window edge-to-edge.
html, body, #root background must be transparent.
All animations must use spring physics (Framer Motion) or CSS keyframes — never linear transitions.
No Electron vibrancy — use CSS backgrounds instead.
Drag regions use .drag-region CSS class, never inline WebkitAppRegion.
Font rendering: -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased.
user-select: none globally.
overflow: hidden on html, body, #root.
Scrollbar: 6px wide, transparent track, #333 thumb with 3px border-radius.

required_elements.description: Invisible draggable area at top of window
required_elements.css_class: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-8 drag-region

required_elements.description: Radial gradient spotlight overlay for stage lighting atmosphere
SHOWTIME label in monospaced uppercase (only in mockup, actual view uses greeting)
Temporal greeting heading like 'Tonight's show hasn't been written yet.'
Subtitle like 'What will you put on stage?'
Primary CTA to enter the Writer's Room (accent-tinted button)
Ghost button to view past shows
Show summary when a today's show can be resumed (e.g., '3/5 acts done — show in progress')
required_elements.conditional: Only visible when todayShow exists and is not completed

required_elements.description: Resume button shown when today's show exists
required_elements.conditional: Only visible when todayShow exists and is not strike

constraints: Uses w-full h-full bg-studio-bg as container.
Content centered vertically and horizontally with flex.
Spotlight overlay must have pointer-events-none.
Entry animation: spotlightFadeIn (blur(8px) to blur(0)) via Framer Motion spring.
Buttons appear with staggered spring animation (delay 1.2s).

required_elements.description: Window title bar with SHOWTIME label and date
SHOWTIME text in title bar
Date label next to SHOWTIME in title bar
Energy level selector dropdown in title bar
Toolbar with view tier and settings controls
Warm overhead spotlight gradient
Contextual greeting based on time of day (e.g., 'Fresh start! Let's build today's show.')
Template buttons (Light day, Deep focus day) for quick show planning

constraints: w-full h-full bg-surface overflow-hidden flex flex-col.
Title bar uses bg-titlebar with border-b border-surface-hover.
Chat area is flex-1 overflow-y-auto.
Empty state is centered with spotlight-warm gradient.

required_elements.description: Window title bar with SHOWTIME label, date, energy picker, and toolbar
Scrollable chat message area with user and assistant messages
User chat bubble (right-aligned)
Assistant chat bubble (left-aligned) with parsed lineup extraction
Timed loading messages while Claude generates lineup (e.g., 'Thinking about your day...')
Text input area at bottom for user messages
Button to trigger lineup generation from chat context

constraints: Chat messages auto-scroll when near bottom (<60px threshold).
Chat messages area uses space-y-3 spacing.
User messages and assistant messages have distinct styling.
Progressive loader animates with writers-dot CSS animation.

required_elements.description: Window title bar with SHOWTIME label, date, energy picker, and toolbar
Tonight's Lineup heading with act count and total duration
Summary like '5 ACTS . ~3h 15m' in monospaced text
Draggable act cards in lineup order with category stripe, clapperboard badge, name, duration, and reorder controls
Drag handle character (double vertical dots)
4px wide colored stripe indicating act category
Clapperboard badge showing CATEGORY | ACT N
Act name text, truncated on overflow
Duration in MM:SS format
Up/down arrow buttons for reordering acts
Primary CTA 'WE'RE LIVE!' button with gradient background
Encouragement text below Go Live button: 'This starts the show. You've got this.'
Chat input for refining the lineup via conversation

constraints: Act cards use space-y-2.5 vertical spacing.
Each act card enters with slideUp animation staggered by 0.08s.
WE'RE LIVE button has glossy overlay gradient.
Divider above Go Live button: border-top 1px solid #2a2a2e.
Lineup is scrollable within the view.

required_elements.description: Stage spotlight gradient overlay
ON AIR light box with pulsing tally light, animated onairGlow
Pulsing red dot inside ON AIR box
Headline: 'Live from your desk, it's [date]!'
required_elements.notes: Date and 'your desk' are accent-colored in mockup

required_elements.description: Subtitle: 'The studio lights are on.'
Show summary line: 'N ACTS . 3 BEATS TO LOCK' (mockup only, not in implementation)
required_elements.conditional: Present in mockup, may not be in current implementation

required_elements.description: Go Live button that appears after 1.8s delay

constraints: Fixed inset-0 full-screen overlay at z-50.
ON AIR indicator animates in with spring (stiffness 200, damping 15, delay 0.3s).
Headline animates in with spring (stiffness 150, damping 20, delay 0.8s).
Go Live button appears after 1.8s delay with spring scale animation.
Plays 'going-live' audio cue on mount.

required_elements.description: Pill-shaped floating container with backdrop blur
10px red pulsing dot when live, OFF state when intermission
Current act name, truncated
Countdown timer in MM:SS format
Beat stars showing locked/unlocked progress (e.g., filled-filled-empty)
required_elements.conditional: Visible in live and strike phases

required_elements.description: Progress bar with ember particle effect below the pill content
required_elements.conditional: Visible when live and timer is running

required_elements.description: 'Intermission' text with 'no rush' sublabel
'Show complete!' text with golden glow animation
Toolbar with view tier control

constraints: Pill renders at exactly 320px wide, 48px tall.
Border radius is 9999px (fully rounded / rounded-full).
Background is surface at 85% opacity with 20px backdrop blur.
Tally light area is draggable (drag-region), rest is clickable to expand.
Stuck pill detection: forces repaint if width/height is 0 after 3s.
Spring animation on enter: stiffness 400, damping 30.
Beat stars at 40% opacity during intermission (mockup spec).

required_elements.description: Rounded container with backdrop blur
required_elements.css_class: w-full h-full rounded-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden

required_elements.description: Top row with tally light, SHOWTIME label, act name, and timer
Small tally light indicator
SHOWTIME branding text
Current act name, clickable to expand view tier
Countdown timer
Progress bar with ember effect
Bottom status bar with beat counter, ON AIR indicator, and start time
required_elements.css_class: flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-1.5 mt-auto

required_elements.description: Beat stars with label
ON AIR light box
Show start time label
Toolbar controls

constraints: rounded-2xl container (16px border radius).
Background is surface at 90% opacity with 20px backdrop blur.
Header row is drag-region, inner content is no-drag and clickable.
Spring animation on enter: stiffness 400, damping 30.
Intermission shows 'Intermission' label and 'no rush' text.
Strike phase shows 'Show complete!' text.

required_elements.description: Rounded container with backdrop blur
required_elements.css_class: w-full h-full rounded-xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden

required_elements.description: Header with tally light, SHOWTIME label, date, and toolbar
Small tally light indicator
SHOWTIME branding
Current date label
Progress bar with ember effect (expanded size)
Category badge for current act (e.g., 'DEEP WORK | ACT 3')
required_elements.conditional: Visible in live phase with current act

required_elements.description: Current act name in large text
Large countdown timer
Timer progress bar under the countdown
Upcoming acts section showing next 2 acts
required_elements.conditional: Visible when upcoming acts exist and phase is not strike

required_elements.description: 'COMING UP' section header
Row showing upcoming act with category dot, name, duration, and sketch label
Bottom bar with ON AIR indicator, beat counter, and start time
ON AIR light box (live/off states)
Beat stars with label
Show start time
'WE'LL BE RIGHT BACK' text for intermission phase
'Show complete!' text with golden glow for strike phase

constraints: rounded-xl container (12px border radius).
Background is surface at 95% opacity with 16px backdrop blur.
Hero timer area is clickable (no-drag) to expand to full view.
Upcoming acts show max 2 items.
Category dot is 6px (w-1.5 h-1.5) with category color.
Spring animation on enter: stiffness 400, damping 30.

required_elements.description: Window chrome title bar with SHOWTIME label, date, and toolbar
SHOWTIME text in title bar
Date label in title bar
Toolbar with Director button and minimize/settings controls
Flex container with timer panel and lineup sidebar
Left side: hero timer with clapperboard badge, act name, 64px countdown, progress bar, and action buttons
Category badge: 'DEEP WORK | ACT 3 | 45:00'
Current act name
Hero countdown display in MM:SS format
4px tall progress bar below timer showing elapsed percentage
Row of action buttons: +15m (neutral), End Act (accent), Rest (category-tinted)
+15m button
End Act button
Rest button (category-tinted purple)
Right sidebar showing act lineup with completed/active/upcoming states
'Show Lineup' section label
Completed act row with checkmark, name (secondary text), category bar, duration, and optional beat star
Active act row with tally dot, bold name (primary text), category bar, and live timer
Upcoming act row with hourglass icon, muted name, category bar, duration
Small horizontal color bar per act in sidebar
Bottom status bar with ON AIR indicator, start time, and beat counter
ON AIR light box in bottom bar
Beat stars with count label
Show start time label
IntermissionView component shown instead of TimerPanel during intermission phase
DirectorMode overlay shown on top of entire view during director phase

constraints: w-full h-full bg-surface overflow-hidden flex flex-col.
Main content is flex row: timer panel (flex-1) + sidebar (200px).
Sidebar border-left separates it from main content.
Title bar and bottom bar use bg-[#151517] with 1px border.
Timer is centered in the timer panel area.
Sidebar is scrollable (overflow-y-auto).
Completed sidebar acts at full opacity; upcoming at 0.6.
Active sidebar act has colored border matching category.
Spring animation on enter: stiffness 300, damping 30.

dimensions.notes: Shown inside ExpandedView's timer panel area, min-height 420px

required_elements.description: ON AIR light box in OFF state (gray, no glow)
required_elements.notes: This is in the bottom bar of the ExpandedView wrapper

required_elements.description: Central 'WE'LL BE RIGHT BACK' card
'INTERMISSION' section label at top of card
'WE'LL BE RIGHT BACK' headline
Random affirmation quote with breathing animation (e.g., 'Rest is free. Always has been.')
Beat stars at reduced opacity showing session progress
required_elements.notes: Mockup shows opacity 0.35 on beat counter container

required_elements.description: 'Back to the show' button (accent-tinted)

constraints: IntermissionView renders as a card inside the ExpandedView timer panel area.
Warm gradient background in mockup: linear-gradient(180deg, #1a1a1e 0%, #1e1c1a 100%).
Affirmation text uses breathe animation (4s ease-in-out infinite).
Beat counter is dimmed (reduced opacity).
No timer running — 'no rush' philosophy.
ON AIR box shows OFF state in the ExpandedView bottom bar.
Spring animation on card enter: stiffness 300, damping 30.

required_elements.description: Window title bar with SHOWTIME label, OFF indicator, and toolbar
ON AIR box in OFF state showing 'OFF'
Golden spotlight gradient behind verdict
Three gold filled stars with golden glow animation
'DAY WON' in large black weight text with golden glow
'You showed up and you were present.'
Beat counter with label (xl size)
Row of stats: Acts Completed, Acts Cut, Beats Locked, Show Duration
Individual stat number
Individual stat label
Act recap panel with section label 'END CREDITS' and act list
'END CREDITS' section header
Individual act in recap: checkmark/x/dash, name, optional beat star
24 confetti pieces falling from top (DAY WON celebration)
'Standing ovation.' celebration text
Action buttons: Add an Encore, Plan Tomorrow, That's a Wrap, View Past Shows
'Add an Encore' button (accent variant)
'Plan Tomorrow' button (neutral variant)
'That's a Wrap' button (neutral variant)
'View Past Shows' ghost button

constraints: w-full h-full bg-surface overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative.
Main content is overflow-y-auto for scrolling.
Verdict headline animates in with spring (stiffness 200, damping 20).
Stats animate in with staggered spring delays (0.2, 0.3, 0.4, 0.5s).
Act recap rows animate in with staggered spring delays (0.5 + i * 0.06s).
Confetti pieces have random horizontal positions and animation delays.
Plays 'show-complete' audio cue on mount.

required_elements.description: Same title bar as DAY_WON
Two gold filled stars, one empty star
'SOLID SHOW' in accent color
'Not every sketch lands. The show was still great.'
Beat counter with label (xl size)
Same stats layout as DAY_WON
Act recap panel
Same footer actions as DAY_WON (without Standing ovation text)

constraints: No confetti animation (DAY WON only).
No golden glow animation on verdict.
No standing ovation text.
Verdict color is accent (#d97757), not beat gold.
Beat stars: 2 filled, 1 empty.

required_elements.description: Same title bar as DAY_WON
One gold filled star, two empty stars
'GOOD EFFORT' in blue color
'You got on stage. That's the hardest part.'
Beat counter with label (xl size)
Same stats layout
Act recap panel
Same footer actions as DAY_WON (without Standing ovation text)

constraints: No confetti animation.
No golden glow animation.
Verdict color is blue (#60a5fa), not accent or beat.
Beat stars: 1 filled, 2 empty.
Implementation uses text-blue-400 class for GOOD_EFFORT verdict.

required_elements.description: Same title bar as DAY_WON
One locked star and two empty stars (1 beat locked from SHOW_CALLED_EARLY)
'SHOW CALLED EARLY' in secondary/muted color
'Sometimes the show is short. The audience still came.'
Beat counter with label (xl size)
Same stats layout
Act recap panel
Same footer actions (without Standing ovation text)

constraints: No confetti animation.
No golden glow animation.
Verdict color is txt-secondary (#9a9890), most subdued of all verdicts.
Beat stars: all 3 empty (dim).
Message is compassionate — 'The audience still came.' — no guilt language.

required_elements.description: Stage spotlight gradient overlay
'Live from your desk...' title text
Day of the week in accent color (e.g., 'it's Wednesday!')

constraints: Fixed inset-0 full-screen at z-50.
Auto-advances to WritersRoomView after 1.5s timeout.
Headline animates in with spring (stiffness 200, damping 20) and scale 0.9 -> 1.
Day name animates in with spring (stiffness 200, damping 20, delay 0.3s) and y 12 -> 0.
Plays 'going-live' audio cue on mount.
Uses font-mono for both headline and day name (differs from GoingLiveTransition which uses font-body).

DAY_WON.headline: DAY WON
DAY_WON.message: Standing ovation. You showed up and you were present.
DAY_WON.implementation_message: You showed up and you were present.

SOLID_SHOW.headline: SOLID SHOW
SOLID_SHOW.message: Not every sketch lands. The show was still great.

GOOD_EFFORT.headline: GOOD EFFORT
GOOD_EFFORT.message: You got on stage. That's the hardest part.

SHOW_CALLED_EARLY.headline: SHOW CALLED EARLY
SHOW_CALLED_EARLY.message: Sometimes the show is short. The audience still came.

OnAirIndicator.description: Broadcast-style ON AIR light box with tally dot

TallyLight.description: Pulsing red dot indicating live session

ClapperboardBadge.description: Category + act number label styled like a film clapperboard slate
ClapperboardBadge.content_pattern: CATEGORY | ACT N or CATEGORY | ACT N | DURATION

BurningFuse.description: Animated progress bar with ember particle effect

Toolbar.description: Shared toolbar component with view tier selector, Director mode button, settings, and collapse controls

ActCard.description: Act card for Writer's Room lineup
